Rudolf Hess flew to Scotland on a secret mission. Decades later he died in prison. Was it suicide or murder. Narrated by Robert Powell.
We explore America's fight against terrorism, looking at 21st Century warfare with the special forces' actions during the Battle of the Black Sea, 9/11, and the hunt for Osama Bin Laden.

We uncover Allied secrets of WWII like a battleship made of ice, bat bombs and pigeon-guided missiles; bizarre stories of extraordinary armaments dreamt up by the most inventive minds. Ep1: The Allies
First displayed in WWI, the tank is one of the most intimidating vehicles ever invented - we study the emergence of these fighting giants during WWII in northern France. S1 E1: Dawn of the Titans
We bring the RAF story into the modern era - another aircraft to have extended the RAF's capabilities is the C130 Hercules. Ep7: The Sky's The Limit

programmes.show_description: Documentary series examining how Hitler came to power. By January 1933, Germany had voted for a chancellor who was openly opposed to democracy. Ep1: Helped Into Power
A dramatised documentary showing the disaster of the Titanic from a unique point of view.
From attacks on Pearl Harbor to the British Mediterranean Fleet and the Tirpitz, midget submarines played their part in some of the most gripping stories of the war. Ep2: Midget Submarines
There are some news events that change the world. In this episode, we look at the events of September 11th 2001.
The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands it to a second front where German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of Russia. Ep9: Eastern Front
The Messerschmitt Bf 109 was matched only by the Spitfire - it was the Luftwaffe's only single-seat fighter for the first few years of WWII and the RAF's nemesis during the Battle of Britain.
The 'Desert Fox' Field Marshal Rommel seemed to have a sixth sense when it came to Allied plans and positions - we take a look into how Rommel's winning streak was broken. S1 E10: Rommel's Enigma
Elizabeth and her daughter return to Eaton Place, but Sarah dislikes Nanny Webster as she is very set in her ways and seems not to be able to cope as she used to. S2 E8: Out of the Everywhere
Arthur keeps acquiring items that won't do his reputation any good - how can he offload them without the rest of the manor finding out he's been conned? S8 E4: Three Cons Make a Mountain
Rigsby is hoping to take new tenant Brenda out for the evening, but he has a cashflow problem and a string of unwelcome visitors who start arriving at the house. S2 E6: Last of the Big Spenders
Mr. Brown becomes ill and cannot come to class. The students all pay him a visit, each with their own 'remedy' to make him feel better. S1 E9: Kill or Cure
Alex has caught a hospital infection and the doctors in 2008 are losing hope for her - a wedge develops between her and Gene and it threatens to tear the team apart. S2 E8
Min orders Bert to lose weight by jogging. Alf keeps pace on a bike, but before long they end up in the pub. S7 E3: Drunk in Charge of a Bicycle
With Chas and Dave, Terry Wogan and Mel Smith. The legendary BAFTA-winning comedy show from Thames TV, all in the best possible taste!

Mata Hari became an icon of betrayal, accused of seducing secrets for espionage. But were the charges real, or was she a scapegoat in World War I hysteria? Narrated by Robert Powell.

The Russian Revolution changed the course of world history and its ramifications are still felt today; explore the events of the Revolution in full and startling colour with vivid archive footage. Ep1
Death rays, rocket-propelled tanks and flying saucers - the imagination and ingenuity of Allied and Nazi weapons experts knew no bounds in their frenzied efforts to overcome the enemy. E2: The Axis
The German forces at the border of Russia anticipated total victory behind the powerful Panzers - Operation Barbarossa involved millions of soldiers and thousands of tanks. S1 E2: The Superior Force
In the 1950s, Britain had a massive railway network. A decade later it was barely recognisable. For better and for worse, this is the story of how and why our railways were changed forever.

programmes.show_name: The Nazis: A Warning From History
programmes.show_description: A look at the extraordinary popularity of both Hitler and the Nazis and the astonishing degree of voluntary support that ordinary Germans gave to the infamous Gestapo. Ep2: Chaos and Consent
Packed with rare and never-before-available footage, we look at the aircraft that made the Royal Air Force of the Cold War era such a formidable fighting force.
When it was impossible for aircraft to land safely on enemy territory, gliders were the perfect answer for delivering special forces behind enemy lines. Ep3: Gliders
...Were You? There are some news events that change the world - in this episode, we take you back to Sunday the 11th of February, 1990 and the release of Nelson Mandela.
The story of the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans. Ep10: D-Day and Liberation
The Beatles were the biggest-selling band of the 1960s, but what happened to John, Paul, George and Ringo after the band broke up?
After WWII, the incredible and innovative weapon systems created by the Third Reich - from jet engines to guided missiles - were uncovered. S1 E11: Secret Weapons of the Third Reich
Lord Southwold has died as Lady Southwold and a companion visit in London, but a valuable brooch goes missing and the staff come under suspicion. S2 E9: An Object of Value
Arthur receives a couple of interesting propositions while attending Charlie Johnson's funeral. S8 E5: Guess Who's Coming to Pinner
Could rumours of the Grey Lady who haunts the house be true? Rigsby certainly believes so, but he has not seen her yet... S2 E7: Things That Go Bump In The Night
Juan brings a Russian sailor friend to the class who has come to England to escape Russia. Everything seems to be going alright until... S1 E10: Hello Sailor
Change is in the air at CID following Alex's shooting as the team works on the kidnap of a young girl and Gene puts his career on the line. S3 E1
